fields.acceptance_criteria: Unresolved search hits are dropped instead of synthesized; deleted tickets never reappear through the query branch; mixed-workspace results preserve authoritative owner workspace and follow-up path information; focused HTTP integration tests lock the contract
fields.title: [ticket-http] Return only authoritative resolved hits in workspace-aware search

fields.acceptance_criteria: Unresolved Tantivy-only hits are dropped instead of synthesized; deleted tickets never reappear through the query branch; mixed-workspace results preserve authoritative owner workspace and follow-up path information; negative fixtures prove that stale Tantivy-only docs, deleted tickets, and wrong local paths cannot escape as fallback ghost summaries; focused ticket-http commands pass for unresolved-hit, authoritative-owner, deleted-hit, and reversible-follow-up fixtures
